title: neomammillaria insularis
intro: Neomammillaria insularis, also known as the island mammillaria, is a species of flowering cactus native to the Mexican island of Isla de Cedros. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various skin conditions and wounds due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria insularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by infusing its stems in hot water or using it in a topical cream or ointment to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
